name: jami-theme
title: Jami Factory Theme
description: Warm Jami factory theme: generated CSS variables, Tailwind @theme variables, TypeScript token names, and shadcn cssVars derived from the DTCG token source.

export const themeNames = [
  "factory",
  "light",
  "dark",
  "solo",
  "business-ops",
  "mixed-media",
  "research-writing",
  "studio-console",
  "editorial-studio",
  "command-grid",
] as const;

export type JamiThemeName = (typeof themeNames)[number];

export const tokenThemes: Record<JamiThemeName, { label: string; mode: "light" | "dark"; workspace?: string; defaultKit?: boolean; restoreTo: string; tokenOverrides: Record<string, unknown> }> = {

  "research-writing": {"label":"Research & Writing workspace","mode":"light","workspace":"research-writing","restoreTo":"factory","tokenOverrides":{"semantic.light.accent":"#6F3D5F","density.workspace":"{density.spacious}","shell.dockWidth":"340px"}},
  "studio-console": {"label":"Studio Console default kit","mode":"light","workspace":"business-ops","defaultKit":true,"restoreTo":"factory","tokenOverrides":{"semantic.light.accent":"#2F6F73","semantic.dark.accent":"#76C6BE","componentState.focusRing":"#C14D84","radius.control":"6px","spacing.control":"8px","density.workspace":"0.95","motion.fast":"100ms","shell.dockWidth":"300px"}},

};

export const factoryThemeName = "factory" as const;

# Jami Token Snippets

Schema: `2026-06-14.token-production`

## CSS

```css
@import "./studio-ui/jami.css";

.app-shell {
  background: var(--jami-semantic-light-background);
  color: var(--jami-semantic-light-foreground);
  border-radius: var(--jami-radius-control);
}
```

## Tailwind

```css
@import "./studio-ui/jami.tailwind.css";
```

## Themes

| Theme | Label | Mode | Workspace | Restores To |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `factory` | Jami factory | light | global | `factory` |
| `light` | Jami light | light | global | `factory` |
| `dark` | Jami dark | dark | global | `factory` |
| `solo` | Solo workspace | light | solo | `factory` |
| `business-ops` | Business Ops workspace | light | business-ops | `factory` |
| `mixed-media` | Mixed Media workspace | dark | mixed-media | `factory` |
| `research-writing` | Research & Writing workspace | light | research-writing | `factory` |
| `studio-console` | Studio Console default kit | light | business-ops | `factory` |
| `editorial-studio` | Editorial Studio default kit | light | research-writing | `factory` |
| `command-grid` | Command Grid default kit | light | mixed-media | `factory` |
